title: Tropical Coral Reef Fish
summary: Underwater school of neon-yellow tang and parrotfish over electric-pink coral.
prompt: An underwater wildlife photograph of a thriving tropical coral reef: a swirling school of neon-yellow tang fish, a regal angelfish, and a colorful parrotfish gliding over a bed of electric-pink, lavender, and orange coral formations. Crystal-clear turquoise water with shafts of sunlight piercing down from the surface. Hyper-realistic underwater photography, full-frame DSLR with strobe lighting, vibrant National Geographic aesthetic. Square 1:1.
